info.title: TallyJ4 API
info.description: Election management and vote tallying system API

get.summary: Gets the profile information for the authenticated user.

put.summary: Updates the profile information for the authenticated user.

post.summary: Changes the password for the authenticated user.

requestBody.description: The password change information including current and new passwords.

get.summary: Generates chart data for visualizing election results.

parameters.name: electionId
parameters.description: The GUID of the election to generate chart data for.

parameters.name: chartType
parameters.description: The type of chart to generate.

post.summary: Compares multiple elections based on specified metrics.

requestBody.description: The comparison request containing election IDs and metrics to compare.

post.summary: Generates a filtered report for an election based on advanced filter criteria.

parameters.name: electionId
parameters.description: The GUID of the election to generate the report for.

requestBody.description: The advanced filter criteria to apply.

post.summary: Generates a custom report based on the provided configuration.

requestBody.description: The configuration for the custom report.

get.summary: Generates statistical analysis for an election.

parameters.name: electionId
parameters.description: The GUID of the election to analyze.

get.summary: Gets a paginated list of audit logs with optional filtering.
Gets a specific audit log by ID.

post.summary: Creates a new audit log entry.
Registers a new user account.

requestBody.description: The registration request containing user details.

post.summary: Authenticates a user and sets secure cookies with access tokens.

requestBody.description: The login request containing email and password.

post.summary: Initiates a password reset by sending a reset email to the user.

requestBody.description: The forgot password request containing the user's email.

post.summary: Resets a user's password using a reset token.

requestBody.description: The reset password request containing the token and new password.

post.summary: Verifies a user's email address using a verification token.

requestBody.description: The verify email request containing the email and verification token.

post.summary: Sets up two-factor authentication for the authenticated user.
Enables two-factor authentication for the authenticated user.

requestBody.description: The enable 2FA request containing the verification code.

post.summary: Disables two-factor authentication for the authenticated user.

requestBody.description: The disable 2FA request containing the verification code.

post.summary: Verifies a two-factor authentication code for login.

requestBody.description: The verify 2FA request containing email, password, and verification code.

post.summary: Refreshes an access token using a valid refresh token and sets secure cookies.

requestBody.description: The refresh token request containing the refresh token.

get.summary: Gets the roles assigned to the authenticated user.

post.summary: Assigns a role to a user. Requires admin privileges.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The ID of the user to assign the role to.

requestBody.description: The assign role request containing the role name.

delete.summary: Removes a role from a user. Requires admin privileges.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The ID of the user to remove the role from.

parameters.name: roleName
parameters.description: The name of the role to remove.

get.summary: Gets all available roles in the system. Requires admin privileges.
Initiates Google OAuth login flow with PKCE (Proof Key for Code Exchange) and state parameter for CSRF protection.

parameters.name: returnUrl
parameters.description: The URL to redirect to after successful authentication (default: frontend origin).

get.summary: Gets information about the currently authenticated user.
Handles the OAuth callback from Google with state parameter validation for CSRF protection.
Logs out the current user by clearing authentication cookies.
Gets a paginated list of ballots for the specified election.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of items per page (1-200).

get.summary: Gets a specific ballot by its GUID.

post.summary: Creates a new ballot.

parameters.name: guid
parameters.description: The GUID of the ballot to update.

delete.summary: Deletes a ballot by its GUID.

parameters.name: guid
parameters.description: The GUID of the ballot to delete.

get.summary: Gets a summary of dashboard information including active elections and key metrics.
Gets a list of recent elections accessible to the current user.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of elections to return (1-100).

get.summary: Gets a complete list of all elections accessible to the current user.

post.summary: Gets static information about a specific election.

requestBody.description: The GUID of the election to get information for.

post.summary: Gets live statistics for a specific election.

requestBody.description: The GUID of the election to get live statistics for.

post.summary: Refreshes and returns the complete list of elections accessible to the current user.
Updates the public listing status of an election for guest tellers.

parameters.name: electionGuid
parameters.description: The GUID of the election to update.

requestBody.description: Whether the election should be publicly listed.

post.summary: Imports an election from TallyJ V2 format (legacy migration feature).

requestBody.description: The V2 election data to import.

post.summary: Sets the physical location for a computer in the election system.

requestBody.description: The request containing computer code and location GUID.

post.summary: Assigns a guest teller to an election.

requestBody.description: The request containing election GUID and teller name.

post.summary: Removes a guest teller from an election.

requestBody.description: The request containing election GUID and teller name to remove.

get.summary: Gets a paginated list of elections with optional status filtering.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of items per page (1-100).

get.summary: Gets a specific election by its GUID.
Gets a summary of a specific election by its GUID.

post.summary: Creates a new election.

parameters.name: guid
parameters.description: The GUID of the election to update.

delete.summary: Deletes an election by its GUID.

parameters.name: guid
parameters.description: The GUID of the election to delete.

get.summary: Gets all eligibility reasons.
Gets the list of eligible voters for an election.

post.summary: Checks in a voter for an election.

get.summary: Gets the roll call information for an election.
Gets the front desk statistics for an election.

post.summary: Parses CSV content and extracts column headers.
Imports ballot data from CSV content.

get.summary: Gets a paginated list of locations for the specified election.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of items per page (1-200).

get.summary: Gets a specific location by its GUID.

parameters.name: electionGuid
parameters.description: The GUID of the election (for route binding).

post.summary: Creates a new location.

parameters.name: electionGuid
parameters.description: The GUID of the election (for route binding).

parameters.name: electionGuid
parameters.description: The GUID of the election (for route binding).

parameters.name: locationGuid
parameters.description: The GUID of the location to update.

parameters.name: electionGuid
parameters.description: The GUID of the election (for route binding).

parameters.name: locationGuid
parameters.description: The GUID of the location to delete.

post.summary: Registers a computer at a specific location.

parameters.name: electionGuid
parameters.description: The GUID of the election (for route binding).

get.summary: Gets all computers registered at a specific location.

parameters.name: electionGuid
parameters.description: The GUID of the election (for route binding).

parameters.name: electionGuid
parameters.description: The GUID of the election (for route binding).

parameters.name: locationGuid
parameters.description: The GUID of the location (for route binding).

parameters.name: computerGuid
parameters.description: The GUID of the computer to delete.

post.summary: Requests a verification code for online voting.
Verifies a voter's verification code for online voting access.

get.summary: Gets public information about an election for online voting.
Gets the list of candidates for an election.

post.summary: Submits an online ballot for an election.

get.summary: Gets the voting status for a specific voter in an election.
Gets a paginated list of people for the specified election with optional filtering.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of items per page (1-200).

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Optional search term to filter people by name.

parameters.name: canVote
parameters.description: Optional filter for people who can vote.

parameters.name: canReceiveVotes
parameters.description: Optional filter for people who can receive votes.

get.summary: Searches for people within an election by name.

parameters.name: electionGuid
parameters.description: The GUID of the election to search in.

get.summary: Gets all candidates (people who can receive votes) for the specified election.

Gets all people in the specified election for ballot entry, including ineligible persons.
VoteCount reflects the live ballot vote count, not the tally result.
Gets a specific person by their GUID.

post.summary: Creates a new person.

parameters.name: guid
parameters.description: The GUID of the person to update.

delete.summary: Deletes a person by their GUID.

parameters.name: guid
parameters.description: The GUID of the person to delete.

post.summary: Uploads a file for people import and stores it in the database.

get.summary: Retrieves all import files for a specific election.
Parses an uploaded file and returns headers, preview data, and auto-mappings.

parameters.name: rowId
parameters.description: The row ID of the import file.

parameters.name: codePage
parameters.description: Optional code page for text encoding.

put.summary: Saves column mappings for an import file.

parameters.name: rowId
parameters.description: The row ID of the import file.

put.summary: Updates file settings like first data row and code page.

parameters.name: rowId
parameters.description: The row ID of the import file.

post.summary: Executes the import of people from the configured file.

parameters.name: rowId
parameters.description: The row ID of the import file.

parameters.name: rowId
parameters.description: The row ID of the import file.

delete.summary: Deletes all people for an election (with safety guards).

get.summary: Gets the count of people for an election.
Gets public home page data including system information.
Gets a list of all available elections that are open for public access.
Gets the current status of a specific election.

parameters.name: electionGuid
parameters.description: The GUID of the election to check.

get.summary: Gets public display data for a specific election, including results formatted for full-screen presentation.

parameters.name: electionGuid
parameters.description: The GUID of the election to display.

get.summary: Performs a health check to verify the service is running properly.

post.summary: Exports an election report in the specified format (PDF, Excel, or CSV).

parameters.name: electionId
parameters.description: The GUID of the election to export.

requestBody.description: The export request containing format and filter options.

post.summary: Calculates the tally results for a specific election.

parameters.name: electionGuid
parameters.description: The GUID of the election to calculate results for.

parameters.name: electionType
parameters.description: The type of election calculation ("normal" or "singlename").

get.summary: Retrieves the tally results for a specific election.

parameters.name: electionGuid
parameters.description: The GUID of the election to get results for.

get.summary: Retrieves summary statistics for a specific election.

parameters.name: electionGuid
parameters.description: The GUID of the election to get statistics for.

get.summary: Retrieves the final election results (only elected and extra positions).

parameters.name: electionGuid
parameters.description: The GUID of the election to get final results for.

post.summary: Refreshes the monitor information and updates computer contact time.

parameters.name: electionGuid
parameters.description: The GUID of the election being monitored.

get.summary: Retrieves monitoring information for a specific election.

parameters.name: electionGuid
parameters.description: The GUID of the election to get monitor info for.

get.summary: Retrieves tie-breaking details for a specific tie break group in an election.

post.summary: Saves tie-breaking vote counts for an election.

get.summary: Retrieves the complete election report for a specific election.

parameters.name: electionGuid
parameters.description: The GUID of the election to get the report for.

get.summary: Retrieves specific report data for an election by report code.

parameters.name: reportCode
parameters.description: The code identifying the specific report.

get.summary: Retrieves presentation data for displaying election results.

parameters.name: electionGuid
parameters.description: The GUID of the election to get presentation data for.

get.summary: Retrieves detailed statistics for a specific election.

parameters.name: electionGuid
parameters.description: The GUID of the election to get detailed statistics for.

post.summary: Creates a new election with basic information (Step 1 of setup).

put.summary: Configures additional election settings (Step 2 of setup).

parameters.name: guid
parameters.description: The GUID of the election to configure.

get.summary: Gets the current setup status of an election.

parameters.name: guid
parameters.description: The GUID of the election to check.

get.summary: Checks if the current authenticated user is a super admin.
Gets a summary of system-wide election statistics for the super admin dashboard.
Gets a paginated list of elections for the super admin dashboard.

parameters.name: Search
parameters.description: Search term to filter elections by name or convenor.

parameters.name: Status
parameters.description: Filter elections by their tally status.

parameters.name: SortBy
parameters.description: Field to sort elections by. Defaults to "dateOfElection".

parameters.name: Page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination. Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: Number of items per page. Defaults to 25.

get.summary: Gets detailed information about a specific election for the super admin dashboard.

parameters.name: guid
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the election.

get.summary: Gets a paginated list of tellers for a specific election.
Gets a specific teller by ID.

post.summary: Creates a new teller for an election.

get.summary: Gets all votes for a specific ballot.
Gets all votes for a specific election.
Gets a specific vote by its ID.

post.summary: Creates a new vote.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the vote to update.

delete.summary: Deletes a vote by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the vote to delete.

locations.description: List of location names to filter by.

candidateNames.description: List of candidate names to filter by.

ballotStatuses.description: List of ballot statuses to filter by.

onlyElected.description: Filter to show only elected candidates.

sortBy.description: Field to sort by (name, votes, turnout, etc.).

success.description: Indicates whether the API operation was successful.

message.description: An optional message providing additional information about the response.

errors.description: A list of error messages, if the operation failed.

rowId.description: The unique row identifier for the audit log entry.

asOf.description: The timestamp when the audit log entry was created.

electionGuid.description: The unique identifier of the election associated with this audit log entry.

locationGuid.description: The unique identifier of the location associated with this audit log entry.

voterId.description: The voter ID associated with this audit log entry.

computerCode.description: The computer code associated with this audit log entry.

AuditLogDto.description: Data transfer object representing an audit log entry.

electionGuid.description: The unique identifier for the election.

dateOfElection.description: The date when the election will be held.

AvailableElectionDto.description: Data transfer object representing an election available for public access.

ballotGuid.description: The unique identifier for the ballot.

locationGuid.description: The GUID of the location where this ballot was cast.

locationName.description: The name of the location where this ballot was cast.

ballotNumAtComputer.description: The ballot number at the specific computer.

computerCode.description: The code of the computer that processed this ballot.

statusCode.description: The status code of the ballot.

teller1.description: The name of the first teller who processed the ballot.

teller2.description: The name of the second teller who processed the ballot.

voteCount.description: The number of votes on this ballot.

votes.description: The list of votes associated with this ballot.

BallotDto.description: Data transfer object representing a ballot with its associated votes.

locationName.description: Name of the location where this ballot was cast.

votes.description: List of votes recorded on this ballot.

BallotReportDto.description: Data transfer object containing information about a ballot in election reports.

averageVotePercentage.description: The average vote percentage across all candidates.

votePercentageVariance.description: The variance in vote percentages among candidates.

clusters.description: Clusters of candidates with similar performance characteristics.

CandidateAnalysisDto.description: Analysis of candidate performance and clustering.

clusterName.description: The name or identifier of this cluster.

candidateNames.description: List of candidate names in this cluster.

averagePerformance.description: The average performance metric for candidates in this cluster.

CandidateClusterDto.description: A cluster of candidates with similar performance characteristics.

totalVotes.description: Total number of votes received by this candidate.

votePercentage.description: Percentage of total votes received by this candidate.

rank.description: Final ranking position of this candidate.

isElected.description: Indicates whether this candidate has been elected.

isEliminated.description: Indicates whether this candidate has been eliminated from the race.

votesByPosition.description: Breakdown of votes received by position on ballots.

firstChoicePercentage.description: Percentage of ballots where this candidate was the first choice.

lastChoicePercentage.description: Percentage of ballots where this candidate was the last choice.

CandidatePerformanceDto.description: Data transfer object containing performance metrics for a candidate.

rank.description: The ranking position of this candidate in the election results.

voteCount.description: Number of votes received by this candidate.

section.description: Section or category this candidate belongs to.

CandidateReportDto.description: Data transfer object containing information about a candidate in election reports.

personGuid.description: The unique identifier for the person (candidate).

fullName.description: The full name of the candidate.

voteCount.description: The number of votes received by this candidate.

rank.description: The rank/position of this candidate in the results.

section.description: The section this candidate belongs to (e.g., "E" for elected, "X" for extra).

isTied.description: Whether this candidate is tied with others.

tieBreakGroup.description: The tie break group number if this candidate is tied.

tieBreakRequired.description: Whether tie breaking is required for this candidate.

closeToNext.description: Whether this candidate's vote count is close to the next candidate's count.

closeToPrev.description: Whether this candidate's vote count is close to the previous candidate's count.

CandidateResultDto.description: Data transfer object representing the result for a single candidate.

ChangePasswordDto.description: Data transfer object for changing a user's password.

title.description: The title text for the axis.

chartType.description: The type of chart to display (bar, pie, line, doughnut).

labels.description: Labels for the chart data points.

data.description: The data values for this dataset.

backgroundColors.description: Background colors for the data points.

borderColors.description: Border colors for the data points.

borderWidth.description: Width of the border around data points.

ChartDatasetDto.description: Represents a dataset for chart visualization.

position.description: Position of the legend (top, bottom, left, right).

responsive.description: Whether the chart should be responsive to container size changes.

text.description: The text content of the title.

personGuid.description: The unique identifier of the person being checked in.

votingMethod.description: The voting method (e.g., 'P' for paper, 'O' for online).

tellerName.description: The name of the teller checking in the voter.

votingLocationGuid.description: The unique identifier of the voting location.

CheckInVoterDto.description: Data transfer object for checking in a voter at the front desk.

locationGuid.description: The GUID of the location to assign to the computer.

ChooseLocationRequest.description: Request model for setting a computer's physical location.

electionGuid.description: The GUID of the election to assign the teller to.

ballotCount.description: The total number of ballots in the election.

locationCount.description: The total number of locations for the election.

ownerEmail.description: The email address of the election owner.

SuperAdminElectionDto.description: Data transfer object containing summary information about an election for super admin dashboard.

email.description: The email address of the election owner.

displayName.description: The display name of the election owner.

role.description: The role of the owner in the election (e.g., Owner, Teller).

SuperAdminElectionOwnerDto.description: Data transfer object representing an election owner with their role information.

totalElections.description: The total number of elections in the system.

openElections.description: The number of elections that are currently open for voting.

upcomingElections.description: The number of elections that are scheduled for the future.

completedElections.description: The number of elections that have been completed and tallied.

archivedElections.description: The number of elections that have been archived.

SuperAdminSummaryDto.description: Data transfer object containing summary statistics for the super admin dashboard.

electionGuid.description: The unique identifier for the election.

calculatedAt.description: The date and time when the tally was calculated.

ties.description: Information about any ties in the election.

TallyResultDto.description: Data transfer object representing the complete results of an election tally.

totalBallots.description: The total number of ballots in the election.

ballotsReceived.description: The number of ballots that have been received.

ballotsNeedingReview.description: The number of ballots that need manual review.

totalVotes.description: The total number of votes cast.

numberToElect.description: The number of positions to be elected.

numberExtra.description: The number of extra positions beyond the required number.

TallyStatisticsDto.description: Data transfer object representing statistical information about an election tally.

rowId.description: The unique row identifier for the teller.

electionGuid.description: The unique identifier of the election this teller belongs to.

usingComputerCode.description: The code of the computer the teller is using.

isHeadTeller.description: Indicates whether this teller is the head teller.

TellerDto.description: Data transfer object representing a teller in an election.

personGuid.description: The unique identifier of the person.

fullName.description: The full name of the candidate.

voteCount.description: The number of votes the candidate received.

tieBreakCount.description: The tie-break vote count for this candidate.

TieCandidateDto.description: Information about a candidate involved in a tie.

personGuid.description: The unique identifier of the person.

tieBreakCount.description: The tie-break vote count for this candidate.

TieCountDto.description: Tie-break count for a specific candidate.

tieBreakGroup.description: The tie-break group number for this tie.

section.description: The election section or position where the tie occurred.

candidates.description: List of candidates involved in the tie.

TieDetailsDto.description: Details about a tie situation that requires manual resolution.

tieBreakGroup.description: The tie-break group number for this tie.

voteCount.description: The vote count that all tied candidates received.

tieBreakRequired.description: Whether a tie-break procedure is required to resolve this tie.

section.description: The election section or position where the tie occurred.

candidateNames.description: List of candidate names involved in the tie.

TieInfoDto.description: Information about a tie situation in election results.

tieBreakGroup.description: Group identifier for this tie situation.

section.description: Section or category where the tie occurred.

candidateNames.description: List of candidate names involved in this tie.

TieReportDto.description: Data transfer object containing information about a tie situation in election reports.

votingRateAcceleration.description: The acceleration rate of voting over time.

segments.description: Voting data segmented by time periods.

peakVotingHours.description: Peak voting hours with their voting rates.

TimeBasedAnalysisDto.description: Time-based analysis of voting patterns and rates.

timePeriod.description: The time period for this turnout data.

periodType.description: Type of time period (Hour, Day, etc.).

ballotsCast.description: Number of ballots cast during this time period.

cumulativeTurnout.description: Cumulative turnout percentage up to this time period.

TimeBasedTurnoutDto.description: Data transfer object containing time-based turnout statistics.

timeRange.description: The time range represented by this segment.

ballotsCast.description: The number of ballots cast during this time segment.

votingRate.description: The voting rate during this time segment.

TimeSegmentDto.description: A time segment with voting statistics.

metric.description: The metric being tracked (turnout, votes, etc.).

points.description: Data points for this metric over time.

TrendDataDto.description: Trend data for a specific metric across multiple elections.

date.description: The date of this data point.

value.description: The value of the metric at this point in time.

electionName.description: The name of the election this point represents.

TrendPointDto.description: A single data point in a trend series.

overallTurnout.description: Overall voter turnout percentage for the election.

turnoutByLocation.description: Turnout percentages broken down by voting location.

earlyVotingCount.description: Number of ballots cast during early voting period.

electionDayVotingCount.description: Number of ballots cast on election day.

earlyVotingPercentage.description: Percentage of total votes that were cast during early voting.

TurnoutAnalysisDto.description: Data transfer object containing analysis of voter turnout patterns.

statusCode.description: The status code of the ballot.

teller1.description: The name of the first teller who processed the ballot.

teller2.description: The name of the second teller who processed the ballot.

UpdateBallotDto.description: Data transfer object for updating ballot information.

dateOfElection.description: The date when the election will be held.

numberToElect.description: The number of positions to be elected.

tallyStatus.description: The current tally status of the election.

convenor.description: The name of the election convenor.

numberExtra.description: The number of extra positions beyond the required number.

showFullReport.description: Whether to show the full election report.

listForPublic.description: Whether to list this election for public access.

showAsTest.description: Whether to mark this election as a test election.

onlineWhenOpen.description: The date and time when online voting opens.

onlineWhenClose.description: The date and time when online voting closes.

electionPasscode.description: The passcode required for teller access.

linkedElectionKind.description: Type of linked election (e.g., "TB" for tie-break).

useCallInButton.description: Whether to use the call-in button feature.

maskVotingMethod.description: Whether to mask the voting method in displays.

onlineCloseIsEstimate.description: Whether the online close time is an estimate.

onlineSelectionProcess.description: Online voting selection process (e.g., "S" for simultaneous).

onlineAnnounced.description: The date and time when online voting was announced.

emailFromAddress.description: Email from address for voter communications.

emailFromName.description: Email from name for voter communications.

emailText.description: Email template text for voter invitations.

emailSubject.description: Email subject line for voter communications.

smsText.description: SMS template text for voter invitations.

UpdateElectionDto.description: Data transfer object for updating an existing election.

firstDataRow.description: The row number where data starts (1-based).

codePage.description: The code page for text encoding.

UpdateFileSettingsDto.description: Data transfer object for updating file settings.

sortOrder.description: The sort order for displaying locations.

UpdateLocationDto.description: Data transfer object for updating an existing location.

otherLastNames.description: Other last names associated with the person.

otherNames.description: Other names associated with the person.

area.description: The area or region the person belongs to.

ineligibleReasonGuid.description: The GUID of the reason why the person is ineligible (if applicable).

UpdatePersonDto.description: Data transfer object for updating an existing person in an election.

usingComputerCode.description: The code of the computer the teller is using.

isHeadTeller.description: Indicates whether this teller is the head teller.

UpdateTellerDto.description: Data transfer object for updating an existing teller.

userName.description: The new username for the user.

email.description: The new email address for the user.

phoneNumber.description: The new phone number for the user.

UpdateUserProfileDto.description: Data transfer object for updating user profile information.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the user.

emailConfirmed.description: Indicates whether the user's email address has been confirmed.

phoneNumberConfirmed.description: Indicates whether the user's phone number has been confirmed.

UserProfileDto.description: Data transfer object representing a user's profile information.

VerifyCodeDto.description: Data transfer object for verifying a voter's code for online voting.

votesPerPosition.description: Array showing number of votes cast for each position on ballots.

voteCountDistribution.description: Distribution of vote counts across different values.

averageVotesPerBallot.description: Average number of votes per ballot.

maxVotesOnSingleBallot.description: Maximum number of votes on any single ballot.

minVotesOnSingleBallot.description: Minimum number of votes on any single ballot.

ballotLengthDistribution.description: Distribution of ballot lengths (number of votes per ballot).

VoteDistributionDto.description: Data transfer object containing analysis of vote distribution patterns.

rowId.description: The unique row identifier for this vote.

ballotGuid.description: The unique identifier of the ballot this vote belongs to.

positionOnBallot.description: The position of this vote on the ballot (1-based indexing).

personGuid.description:
The unique identifier of the person (candidate) being voted for.
Can be null for certain types of votes.

personFullName.description: The full name of the person being voted for.

statusCode.description: The status code of the vote (e.g., "ok", "spoiled").

personCombinedInfo.description: Combined information about the person for display purposes.

onlineVoteRaw.description: Raw data from online voting systems.

VoteDto.description:
Data transfer object representing a vote in an election.
Contains vote details including candidate information and ballot context.

fullName.description: Full name of the candidate who received this vote.

position.description: Position/order of this vote on the ballot.

VoteReportDto.description: Data transfer object containing information about a single vote in election reports.

locationName.description: Name of the location where this voter is registered.

voted.description: Indicates whether this voter has cast their ballot.

voteTime.description: Timestamp when this voter cast their ballot.

VoterReportDto.description: Data transfer object containing information about a voter in election reports.

averageVotesPerBallot.description: The average number of votes cast per ballot.

voteDistribution.description: Distribution of votes by position (position number -> vote count).

strategicVotingIndex.description: Index measuring the level of strategic/tactical voting.

ballotCompletenessRate.description: The rate at which ballots are fully completed.

VotingPatternAnalysisDto.description: Analysis of voting patterns and ballot completion.

patternType.description: The type of voting pattern (bullet, full, truncated).

count.description: The number of ballots exhibiting this pattern.

percentage.description: The percentage of total ballots exhibiting this pattern.

VotingPatternDto.description: Represents a specific voting pattern identified in the analysis.

Bearer.description: JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. Enter your token in the text input below.
